comments.title: Copper Pyramids
comments.content:
A while back, I asked about a copper pyramid I sat in/under at an event I went to. Nobody (at the time) seemed to be able to explain why the energy felt different in/under the pyramid. Lots of ideas were bandied about. The most intriguing (to me) was the potential of interacting with the solar wind or solar flares.

I did some research and learned that solar wind interact with Earth's magnetic field, but not just in a planet-sized way. The solar wind reacts with the atmosphere (creating electrojets). The thickness of the crust and the composition of the crust affect how much the electrojets are attracted (so using data from an existing magnetometer station wouldn't necessarily correlate to what was happening at my location). And magnetometers are rather pricey, so I wasn't going to buy one just to experiment with.

But then NASA announced they were doing a citizen-science project, to get ground-level magnetometer readings to compare with their in-space radiation readings. I applied and was accepted. I have done a very small experiment (as I do not want to contaminate their data), comparing readings from the magnetometer with a small rectangle of copper wire around it, then with a small rectangle of copper wire with two more wires connecting opposite corners reaching over the top of the meter (an attempt at a pyramid), and then a reading with all the wires just piled on top of the meter.

Short version, any configuration of copper around or over the magnetometer seems to lower the overall magnetic field. This seems to be due to blocking solar radiation, as the Earth's magnetic field is considered static. (It changes, but very slowly.)

I found one article that describes how humans react to unchanging magnetic fields: https://maglab.caltech.edu/human-magnetic-reception-laboratory/ TL;DR: Humans have magnetite in their brain which detect magnetic fields. Fixed (unchanging) fields increase alpha waves, associated with a relaxed mind not focused on a stimulus.

No question, just wanted to share. :-)

replies.title: Re: Copper Pyramids
replies.content: Good heavens. I remember when "pyramid power" was all the rage, back in the 1970s, and people built pyramids to meditate in.

replies.title: Re: Copper Pyramids
replies.content: You can look at the table in the Wikipedia articles for "magnetic susceptibility" and "diamagnetism" for other materials to try. Copper has a diamagnetic effect opposite of that of iron and about half a billionth the strength. I have less intuition for this than I should, but I would expect copper to push magnetic field lines away sideways, so that even a static magnetic field would be (slightly) weaker when the detector was in line along the field lines with (or surrounded by) the copper, and (slightly) stronger when the detector was off to one side from the copper relative to the field lines.

comments.title: freedom from mandates
comments.content:
JMG,

Hello. I live in a state that is considering enacting laws that take away parental rights to claim conscientious exemptions from required vaccinations for school-age children, both for those attending school and even for those being homeschooled.

My daughter is five years old. I would like her to be free of vaccine mandates. I would also like to stay living in the state where I am (even though I revile some of the political currents here).

I understand that doing political magic isn't a good idea, but as I mentioned, I want my daughter to be free of the mandates and would like to do something to support this in addition to writing to my state senator.

Wondering if you might please offer suggestions for magical working to help this happen. I have completed Learning Ritual Magic and am working through Circles of Power. I am wondering about making a talisman (perhaps Jupiter or Mercury) or perhaps doing planetary charity?

Wondering also about my statement of intent: My daughter_________ is free of vaccine mandates and able to attend school or homeschool in the state of______

Thank you.

replies.title: Re: freedom from mandates
replies.content: Nope. Political magic is a bad idea. Your best bet is to relocate.

replies.title: Re: freedom from mandates
replies.content: You might see about getting nasal-spray vaccines. Those might still give you ADE but not the other systemic stuff.

comments.title: Reading
comments.content:
For a question asking if my higher self or guardian angel sent those cigarette synchronities I got a couple weeks back, I got:

LW:Gwyn
RW: Mab
Judge: Ffordd

What is your interpretation?

(For external entities, I got a null answer.)

Patrick H

replies.title: Re: Reading
replies.content: Mab is unfavorable, Gwyn is favorable, and Ffordd is a mixed bag. I'd read this as "kinda sorta, but not really." You are jumping to conclusions; let the process play out, and you'll figure it out in due time.

replies.title: Re: Reading
replies.content:
If it wasn't an outside entity and might not be my Higher Self or guardian angel, what are some other possibilities for how those synchronities could arise? Maybe my Higher Self triggered the wrong events while intending to send me some sort of indication?

Patrick H

replies.title: Re: Reading
replies.content: The universe is a very busy place and it's full of countless beings and forces. Any of them could be involved in generating synchronicities.

replies.title: Re: Reading
replies.content:
So even a point-blank question on whether an external entity generated the synchronities might not be able to detect all those possible outside entities and forces?

Patrick H

replies.title: Re: Reading
replies.content: You'd have to already know enough to be able to interpret the reading.
